# FastSoyAdmin

> Full-stack admin template: FastAPI (Python 3.12+) + Vue3 (TypeScript). Layered backend with auto-discovered business modules, CLI-driven CRUD code generation, three-level RBAC (menu / button / API) plus row-level data scope, Redis-backed permission cache, multi-worker startup lock, built-in Radar request/SQL/exception dashboard, and Docker Compose deployment.

- Source: https://github.com/sleep1223/fast-soy-admin
- Preview: https://fast-soy-admin.sleep0.de/
- Docs: https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/
- API reference (Apifox): https://apifox.com/apidoc/shared-7cd78102-46eb-4701-88b1-3b49c006504b
- Frontend upstream: https://github.com/soybeanjs/soybean-admin
- License: MIT

Branches:
- `main` — default branch, ships with example business module `app/business/hr/` (employees / departments / tags)
- `slim` — clean template skeleton with no example modules (coming soon)

## Consolidated context

Single self-contained file for LLMs: [llms-full.md](llms-full.md)

## Documentation

### Guide
- [Introduction](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/guide/intro): Project overview, monorepo layout, highlights
- [Quick Start](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/guide/quick-start): Prerequisites, Docker and local dev via `make`

### Backend
- [Introduction](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/intro): Tech stack, top-level layout, startup flow
- [Architecture](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/architecture): Middleware, request lifecycle, RBAC, multi-worker init, cache model
- [Development Guide](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/development): End-to-end CLI flow for a new business module
- [Commands](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/commands): Makefile reference (`make cli-init/gen/gen-web`, dev, check)
- [API Conventions](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/api): URL rules, response format, pagination, sqid IDs, CRUDRouter
- [Response Codes](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/codes): 0000 / 1xxx / 21xx–26xx system segments + 4xxx project-defined (HR sample 40xx), frontend code→behavior mapping
- [Auth & Permissions](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/auth): JWT, DependAuth / DependPermission, require_buttons / require_roles, token_version
- [RBAC](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/rbac): User ↔ Role ↔ Menu / Button / Api
- [Data Scope](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/data-scope): Row-level access control (all / department / self / custom)
- [Cache](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/cache): Redis key layout, invalidation
- [Startup Init & Reconciliation](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/init-data): ensure_menu / ensure_role / reconcile_menu_subtree
- [Concurrency](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/concurrency): Transactions, optimistic / pessimistic / distributed locks
- [Database](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/database): DB_URL config, SQLite / PostgreSQL / MySQL / SQL Server, business-module independent DB
- [Deployment](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/deployment): Docker Compose, manual deploy, Nginx, initdb vs migrate
- [Configuration](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/config): `.env` settings
- [Models](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/models): User / Role / Menu / Api / Button / Dictionary
- [Model Mixins](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/mixins): BaseModel / AuditMixin / TreeMixin / SoftDeleteMixin
- [Schemas](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/schema): SchemaBase, PageQueryBase, Success / Fail / SuccessExtra, make_optional
- [CRUDBase](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/crud): Generic single-resource CRUD + build_search
- [CRUDRouter](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/crud-router): 6-route factory, `@override`, `action_dependencies`, `_OrderedRouter`
- [ORM Cookbook](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/orm-cookbook): Tortoise ORM recipes (prefetch, bulk, transaction, raw SQL)
- [app.utils](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/utils): Re-export surface for business modules
- [Radar Monitoring](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/radar): Requests / SQL / exceptions / audit dashboard
- [Autodiscover](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/core/autodiscover): How `app/business/*` is loaded
- [Event Bus](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/core/events): `emit` / `on` for cross-module decoupling
- [Sqids IDs](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/core/sqids): `SqidId` / `SqidPath`, encode / decode, rotating SECRET_KEY
- [State Machine](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/core/state-machine): Transition validation
- [HR Reference Module](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/backend/business/hr): End-to-end business module example

### Frontend
- [Introduction](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/intro): Vue3 + Vite + NaiveUI + Pinia + Alova stack
- [Router Introduction](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/router/intro): Elegant Router, RouteMeta
- [Route Structure](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/router/structure): Single / nested / multi-level / param routes
- [Route Creation](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/router/create): File-system route generation
- [Dynamic Routes](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/router/dynamic): Backend-driven menu / route delivery
- [Route Guards](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/router/guard): Auth flow, `beforeEach`, `afterEach`
- [Route Cache](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/router/cache): `keep-alive`, `defineOptions({ name })`
- [Route Component](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/router/component): layout.base / layout.blank / view.xxx
- [Router Push](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/router/push): `useRouterPush`
- [Request Introduction](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/request/intro): Alova factory, env config
- [Request Usage](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/request/usage): `fetchXxx` API pattern
- [Proxy](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/request/proxy): Dev Vite proxy, prod Nginx proxy
- [Connect Backend](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/request/backend): Token handling, code → behavior mapping
- [Theme Introduction](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/theme/intro): Theme system overview
- [Theme Config](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/theme/config): `src/theme/settings.ts`
- [UnoCSS Theme](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/theme/unocss): Atomic CSS integration
- [Icon Introduction](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/icon/intro): Iconify + local SVG
- [Icon Usage](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/icon/usage): Compile-time, runtime, render-function
- [useNaivePaginatedTable](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/frontend/hooks/use-table): Table data hook

### Standards
- [Overview](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/standard/): Code standards index
- [Naming](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/standard/naming): Files, identifiers, URLs, role / button codes, cache keys, events
- [Vue Style](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/standard/vue): SFC rules
- [Backend Style](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/standard/backend): PR-review checklist for Python code

### Other
- [FAQ](https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/faq/): Common issues (startup, modules, permissions, routes, deployment)

## Tech Stack

Backend: Python 3.12+, FastAPI, Pydantic v2, Tortoise ORM 1.x (vendored at `/tortoise-orm/`), Redis (fastapi-cache2), Argon2, PyJWT (HS256), Sqids, Granian, fastapi-guard, built-in Radar dashboard, Ruff, basedpyright (standard), uv.
Frontend: Vue 3.5, Vite 7, TypeScript 5.9, Naive UI, Pinia 3, UnoCSS, Alova, Elegant Router, vue-i18n, ECharts 6, ESLint + oxlint, vue-tsc, pnpm workspaces.
DevOps: Docker Compose (Nginx :1880 + FastAPI :9999 + Redis), `Makefile` as single entrypoint for every command.

## Architecture

Monorepo: backend at `/app`, frontend under `/web` (pnpm workspaces).

Backend layers: `api/` → `services/` → `controllers/` (CRUDBase) → `models` + `schemas`. System modules in `app/system/`, business modules in `app/business/<name>/` are autodiscovered at startup. `app.system` never imports `app.business`; business modules import via `app.utils` and must not import sibling business modules (use the event bus).

RBAC: `User ↔ Role ↔ {Menu, Button, Api}`. `R_SUPER` bypasses all checks. API permissions are automatically reconciled against FastAPI routes on startup (`refresh_api_list()`); menus / buttons are declared per-module via `ensure_menu()` with optional `reconcile_menu_subtree()` for IaC subtrees. Roles are upserted via `ensure_role()`. Row-level `data_scope` (`all / department / self / custom`) is applied via `build_scope_filter`.

Response contract: `{"code": "0000", "msg": "OK", "data": {...}}`, HTTP status always 200. Resource IDs are sqid strings (not auto-increment ints). Fields are camelCase across the HTTP boundary (automatic via `SchemaBase`). JWT: access 12h, refresh 7d, HS256, versioned via `token_version:{uid}` in Redis.

Frontend: Views → Pinia stores → Alova service → HTTP. Dynamic routes are fetched after login from `/api/v1/route/user-routes`; constant routes from `/api/v1/route/constant-routes`. Elegant Router auto-generates routes from `views/` file structure (route name `module_page`). Auto token refresh on code `2103`, auto logout on `2100 / 2101`, modal logout on `2102`.

## Quick Start

Docker (recommended):
```
git clone https://github.com/sleep1223/fast-soy-admin && cd fast-soy-admin
make up                                                   # nginx :1880, fastapi :9999, redis :6379
docker compose exec app uv run python -m app.cli initdb   # first-run only, tables + seed
docker compose restart app
```

Local development:
```
make install-all  # backend (uv sync) + frontend (pnpm install)
make initdb       # first-time database bootstrap
make dev          # parallel backend :9999 + frontend :9527
```

New business module:
```
make cli-init MOD=inventory                  # scaffold app/business/inventory/
# edit app/business/inventory/models.py
make cli-gen-all MOD=inventory CN=库存管理    # generate backend + frontend CRUD
# merge the three .md i18n stubs under web/src/locales/langs/_generated/inventory/
make mm                                      # makemigrations + migrate
make dev
```

Quality gate:
```
make check-all    # ruff + basedpyright + pytest + eslint + oxlint + vue-tsc
```

## Project Structure

```
/app/                      # Backend (FastAPI)
  __init__.py              # App factory, lifespan, multi-worker init
  core/                    # Framework infra (no business logic)
  system/                  # Auth, RBAC, user, role, menu, api, dictionary, radar
  business/                # Auto-discovered business modules
    hr/                    #   Reference module (employee / department / tags)
  cli/                     # Code generator (init / gen / gen-web / initdb)
  utils/                   # Unified re-export surface for business modules

/web/src/                  # Frontend (Vue3)
  views/                   # Pages (Elegant Router source)
  service/api/             # Alova API wrappers
  typings/api/             # TypeScript type declarations
  store/modules/           # Pinia: auth / route / tab / theme / app
  router/                  # Elegant Router config + guards
  layouts/                 # Base layout, blank layout
  locales/                 # vue-i18n (zh-CN / en-US)
  hooks/                   # Vue composables (useNaivePaginatedTable, useRouterPush)
  theme/                   # Theme settings

/deploy/                   # Docker + Nginx configs
/migrations/               # Tortoise ORM migrations (per DB app)
/tests/                    # pytest suites
Makefile                   # Single entrypoint for all commands
```
